name: Kung Pao
recipeInstructions:
1. MARINADE
- 2 teaspoons Cornstarch
- 2 teaspoons Soy sauce
- 2 teaspoons Sherry
- 1 Egg white
- 1/2 teaspoon Salt
- 2 teaspoons Ginger, chopped
- 2 onions, green
- 1/4 cup Nuts
2. SEASONING
- 2 teaspoons Cornstarch
- 2 teaspoons Sherry
- 1/2 tablespoon Soy sauce
- 1 teaspoon Vinegar
- 1/2 teaspoon Salt
- 1/2 teaspoon Sugar
- 2 tablespoons Sesame oil
- 4 tablespoons Peanut oil
3. Prepare the ingredients:
- Cut green onions into pieces (about 3/4 inch).
- Cut boned chicken breast into small pieces.
4. Mix cornstarch, soy sauce, sherry, slightly beaten egg white in a bowl.
5. Add remaining marinade ingredients and blend well.
6. Add chicken and marinate overnight in the refrigerator.
7. Heat oil in a wok.
8. Add chicken and stir fry until it turns white.
9. Add ginger and scallion, cook for a few more seconds.
10. Add peanuts and seasonings.
11. When the sauce is slightly thickened and coats the food, remove from heat and serve hot.
